sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, float_val Float64, num Nullable(Int32));
SELECT id, toUInt32OrDefault(-value, CAST(-1, 'UInt32')) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
SELECT id, toUInt32OrDefault(float_val, CAST('0', 'UInt32')) AS float_converted_value FROM test_table WHERE float_val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, toUInt32OrDefault(CAST(num AS String), '0') AS num_converted_value, -a.id AS negative_id FROM test_table WHERE num IS NOT NULL HAVING negative_id < -2;
SELECT id, toUInt32OrDefault(toUInt32OrDefault(value, '0'), 0) AS double_converted_value FROM test_table WHERE value <> '';
SELECT t1.id, toUInt32OrDefault(CONCAT(t2.value, '42'), '0') AS combined_value FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON toUInt32OrDefault(t1.value, '0') > 1;
WITH (SELECT toUInt32OrDefault(value, '0') FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) AS subquery_value SELECT id, -subquery_value AS negative_subquery_value FROM test_table WHERE id > 0;
SELECT id, -toUInt32OrDefault(NULLIF(value, 'abc'), CAST('0', 'UInt32')) AS fallback_value FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id UInt32, related_value String);
SELECT t1.id, toUInt32OrDefault(jt.related_value, CAST('0', 'UInt32')) AS related_converted_value FROM test_table t1 LEFT JOIN join_table jt ON t1.id = jt.join_id HAVING related_converted_value > 50;
SELECT id, -toUInt32OrDefault(CAST(float_val AS String), '10') AS negated_float_conversion FROM test_table WHERE float_val IS NOT NULL;
